questions.title: Short question title
questions.context: Exhaustive codebase info, prior decisions, refs ADR/spec, or constraints relevant to this question. Per D-NEW-19 this field is exhaustive — all harvested context is surfaced, not filtered.

options.label: Option label
options.description: Tradeoff or elaboration for this option

questions.title: Example of question with conditional follow-up
questions.context: This question demonstrates the follow_up shape: when answer === follow_up.trigger, the nested question MUST be appended to this section's questions[] on refresh (D-08, D-NEW-18).

question.title: Clarification question appended when Q-02 answer is 'b'
question.context: Exhaustive context for the follow-up — same rules as parent.
